112 
INHLTN_THRPY_CHRG_AMT 
LABEL: 
Inhalation Therapy Charge Amount ($) 
DESCRIPTION: The charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for inhalation therapy services (respiratory and 
pulmonary function) provided during the beneficiary's stay. 
SHORT NAME: INHLTAMT 
LONG NAME: INHLTN_THRPY_CHRG_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
MedPAR (derived) 
VALUES: 
—
